initial_draft:
As Player BLUE, I currently have no resources and RED is offering me 30 Dollars. Since I have nothing to trade and RED has all the resources, accepting this offer seems reasonable. I can use these Dollars in future games (though the rules state there are no future games, so this might not apply). However, since this is the only offer and I have no resources to counter, accepting is the best option.

<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE>
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, and accepting 30 Dollars from RED is the best option available. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> Thanks for the fair offer, RED! </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
